history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The cells to my right on row 07 are open floor, so I should turn right to face a safe direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is a free floor cell, so moving forward is safe. The goal is not visible, and turning would not help immediately. Advancing along the open corridor is the best next step while avoiding the lava column at C and the wall at E.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a safe floor cell. To my right is a wall at row 07 column E, and to my left is lava at row 07 column C. Moving forward is the only safe progress.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a safe floor cell. The goal is not visible, and turning would not be better than advancing into the open corridor. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a safe floor cell. The goal is not visible, and turning would not help immediately. Moving forward is the safest useful action, while avoiding the lava at row 07 column C and the wall at row 07 column E.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The cell to my left at row 07 column C is safe floor, while the cell to my right at row 07 column E is a wall. To move toward a safe path, I should turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is floor, so moving forward is safe. The goal is visible higher up at row 01 column F. There is a clear vertical path in column D, and moving forward advances toward the goal while avoiding the lava at column E.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible ahead and to the right at row 02 column F. I am at row 07 column D facing upward, so the cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a safe floor cell. Moving forward is safe and advances me toward the open path leading upward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible ahead and to the right at row 03 column F. I am at row 07 column D facing upward, so the cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is safe floor. Moving forward brings me closer to the open path toward the goal, while turning is unnecessary right now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible ahead and to the right. I am facing upward, so the cell directly in front of me is safe floor, while the cell to my right is lava. Moving forward is the safe action that progresses toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible two rows ahead and two columns to the right of my position. I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is safe floor. Moving forward advances toward the open path on row 05, while turning would delay progress. I should step forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible one row ahead and two columns to the right of my position. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, while the cells to my left and right on my current row are lava. Moving forward is the safe action that also brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is visible to my right on row 07 column F, with open floor at row 07 column E between us. To move toward the goal, I should turn right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly ahead of me by two cells: my current position is at row 07 column D, the cell in front at row 06 column D is safe floor, and the next cell at row 05 column D is the goal. Moving forward is safe and brings me closer immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front-left relative to my current position, but I am facing upward and the cell straight ahead is the goal at row 06 column D. Since that cell is safe and is the goal, I should move forward immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
